---
title: "Project Selection & Design"
author: "Project Planning & Management Series"
description: "This session will prepare participants to evaluate potential LWG projects and assess their fit using the project rubric and theory of change. "
categories:
    - TBD
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/proj-planning-mgt/content/project-design.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/proj-planning-mgt/content/project-design.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
